headline: Vistra Taps Chief AI And Digital Officer As Growth Story Evolves
summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) has appointed Damian Leach as Chief AI & Digital Officer in a newly created C suite role. Leach will lead company wide digital and AI transformation efforts, focusing on technology modernization and client facing capabilities. For investors tracking Vistra at a share price of $163.46, this new appointment adds a fresh layer to the story behind the ticker. The company has delivered very large 3 year and 5 year returns, with the 1 year return at 54.2% and the 30 day return...
